description.unified: Deals a total of M.DMG over 7 attacks to nearby enemies in a circular range of self. Then, attacks frontal enemies in range, dealing M.DMG and knocking them down for [1.5 sec->3 sec].

Unleashes the power of [Arcane Crystals] within to deal M.DMG to all enemies and stun them for [0.5 sec->2 sec]. Upon casting, activates [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for [10 sec->15 sec], which increases ATK Spd of [Kirze by 35%->all allies by 300] and releases a shockwave every [1.3 sec->2 sec] to enemies in range of self, dealing M.DMG and stunning them for 1 sec.

Summons [Arcane Crystals] and deals M.DMG to frontal enemies in a straight line. Shortly afterward, causes an explosion that deals additional M.DMG and inflicts [Arcane Crystal Curse] upon enemies for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by [10%->200]. Attacking enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse] inflicts a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes after 5 sec, dealing M.DMG equal to ??? + ??? per stack of [Arcane Crystal] Energy.
Increases own ATK by ??? and Crit Chance by [250->200] , while increasing the duration of CCs that all allies inflict to Bosses by [15%->30%].

dark.unified: When there is 1 enemy, increases DMG by 100%.
Increases the caster's DMG to all Non-hero enemies by 20% while under [Arcane Crystall Awakening].

light.unified: Increases DMG to Non-hero enemies by 25% for [10 sec->20 sec] at the beginning of each battle.

description.unified: [Slash Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by [1000->1].
[Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd [of all allies by 10%->by an additional {0}] and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [ (removed) {0} -> 250] for the duration of Skill.
[Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Decreases Cooldown by 30%, and gaining 1 stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy] has a {0}% chance to add 3 additional stacks.
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases [Crit DMG by 32%->Crit Chance by an additional 250] and the effect of the duration of CC increases chances to {0}%.

dark.unified: Increases Crit DMG by [30%->40%] and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect is boosted by 2 times once Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.

description.unified: Amplifies the power of Arcane Crystals and greatly increases the effect range of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!]. Normal and Skill attacks have a [8%->4%] chance to deal additional M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. DMG is doubled against Bosses.

Summons the Soul of Judgment Edge, Elicipira, changing the activation chance of the additional M.DMG effect of Judgment Edge, Elicipira to [20%->10%] and reducing [M.DMG taken by 50%->All DMG taken by 40%] for 10 sec.

1.from: For the duration of Skill, increases ATK by 45%.
1.to: For the duration of Skill, Increases ATK by 50%.
1.unified: For the duration of Skill, Increases ATK by [45%->50%].

2.from: Changes the activation chance of Elicipira’s additional M.DMG to 30%.
2.to: Increases the duration by 5 sec and changes the activation chance of Judgment Edge, Elicipira to 15%.
2.unified: Increases the duration by 5 sec and changes the activation chance of Judgment Edge, Elicipira to [30%->15%].
